'''Won-wons''' were a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] delicacy. They were a greasy dinner pastry.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Won-won}}</ref> [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] thought that they tasted like [[Granite slug/Legends|granite slugs]], except slimier.

{{Food-stub}}
